key.name: automatic-switching
key.description: Whether the extension should change GNOME's color-scheme setting at civil dusk and civil dawn.

key.name: debug-logging
key.description: Whether the extension should write diagnostic messages to the GNOME Shell log.

key.name: cached-latitude
key.description: The most recent latitude used to calculate civil dusk and civil dawn.

key.name: cached-longitude
key.description: The most recent longitude used to calculate civil dusk and civil dawn.

key.name: cached-location-timestamp
key.description: Unix timestamp in seconds for the cached location.

key.name: transition-mode
key.description: The solar transition mode. Version 1 exposes only civil twilight.
